input.contents:
# DownloadableDocumentsList

Presentational list of document rows with a download action. Use `DownloadableDocumentListItem` for custom layouts; default `DownloadableDocumentsList` maps `items` and wraps them in a `Card`.

- **Props:** `items: DownloadableDocumentListItemData[]` — `id`, `title`, optional `description`, `formatHint`, `href`.
- **No IO:** parents supply URLs (mock `#` anchors in prototypes).

content.text:
Here is what was implemented.

### 1. `scaffold workspace-ui add-component DownloadableDocumentsList --package ui-lib`
That generated the folder; the default “card + dialog” shell was **replaced** with a real presentational list.

### 2. `packages/ui-lib/src/components/downloadable-documents-list/DownloadableDocumentsList.tsx`
- **`DownloadableDocumentListItem`** — one row: icon (`File01Icon` + `HugeiconsIcon`), title, optional description / `formatHint`, outline **Download** button (`<a href download>` with `aria-label`).
- **`DownloadableDocumentsList`** — `Card` with title/description and a `<ul>` of items (or optional `emptyContent`).

### 3. Storybook
- **`Default`** — full list; first row title is **"How to list downloadable documents,"** (same as requested).
- **`SingleRow`** — only that first row in a bordered list.

### 4. `CertificationRequestWizard.tsx` (review = `activeStep === 3`)
- `MOCK_RULESET_DOCUMENTS` with that string as the **first** entry, plus two more mock PDFs.
- **`DownloadableDocumentsList`** under the existing review grid, titled **“Regels en documentatie”**, with Dutch helper copy stating links are mocked.

### 5. Exports
`packages/ui-lib/src/index.ts` and the folder `index.ts` export **`DownloadableDocumentListItem`**, **`DownloadableDocumentsList`**, and the related **types**.

**Checks:** `oxlint` on the new folder passes (Hugeicons instead of `lucide-react` per repo rules). `bun run build` in `apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding` succeeds.

**Why this fixes the product ask:** Step 4 already showed the inquiry package; it now also surfaces a **ruleset / documentation** block using a reusable **ui-lib** list, with the first mock document title exactly **"How to list downloadable documents,"** and placeholder `#procertus-doc-…` hrefs until a real API exists.

Read-only summary before submit: optional **`requester`** block (who submits + company), then `notice`, then a `Table` of **`rows`**. Parent supplies all copy and values — no IO.

content.text:
Here is what changed.

### `RequestPackageReview` (`packages/ui-certification`)
- New types: **`RequestPackageRequesterContext`** (`requesterName`, optional `requesterEmail`, `organizationName`, optional `organizationDetails`) and **`RequestPackageReviewRequesterPresentation`** (that context plus optional Dutch/English label overrides).
- New prop: **`requester?: RequestPackageReviewRequesterPresentation`**. When set, a **“Requester & organization”** panel (muted bordered region) is rendered **above** `notice` and the table, with a two-column layout on `sm+`.
- Defaults for headings/labels are **English**; apps pass Dutch (or other) strings via `sectionTitle`, `requesterLabel`, `requesterEmailLabel`, `organizationLabel`.
- Table cell class updated to **`wrap-break-word`** to satisfy the linter hint.

### Package exports
`RequestPackageRequesterContext` and `RequestPackageReviewRequesterPresentation` are exported from `@procertus-ui/ui-certification`.

### App wiring
- **`reviewRequesterFromSession.tsx`** — builds `requester` from **`useMockPrototypeSession()`** (display name, email, represented org, workspace + role in `organizationDetails`), with **Dutch** labels.
- **`CertificationRequestWizard`** — optional **`reviewRequester`** passed through to **`RequestPackageReview`**. The review step **prototype sidebar `Card`** is restored next to the review card.
- **`RequestCreationPage`** / **`RequestEditPage`** — pass **`reviewRequester={reviewRequesterFromSession(session)}`**.
- **`AnonymousOnboardingFlow`** — **`onboardingReviewRequesterFromContext`** for intake context; wizard gets **`reviewRequester`**, summary **`RequestPackageReview`** gets the same. **`buildRows`** no longer duplicates org/contact (those live in **`requester`**); rows are **country**, **KYC notes**, then **drafts**.
- **`RequestDetailPage`** / **`OrganizationPage`** — pass **`reviewRequester`**. Organization table rows are reduced to **client status** only so org/user are not duplicated.

### Storybook
**`BeforeSubmit`** now includes a sample **`requester`** block.

**Verification:** `bun run build` in `apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding` succeeds; `oxlint` on the review component folder passes.

[REDACTED]

content.text:
Here’s how `RequestPackageReview` was aligned with **Typography** and **Spacing** guidelines.

### Spacing (spacing-guidelines.mdx)
- **Between major blocks** in the card body: `space-y-component` → **`flex flex-col gap-section`** (section-scale rhythm).
- **Requester panel**: raw `p-4` / `gap-4` / `mt-3` → **`p-section`**, **`gap-section`** on the grid, **`mt-component`** under the title.
- **Tight stacks** (label + value, lines in a column): **`gap-micro`** and **`gap-component`** between field groups instead of `space-y-2`.
- **Organization details** paragraphs: **`[&_p+p]:mt-micro`** instead of `mt-2`.
- **Borders/radius**: requester block **`rounded-xl`**; table shell **`rounded-xl`** to match card examples in the docs.

### Typography (Guidelines.mdx)
- **Card + copy**: base **`text-base`** and **`leading-[1.6]`** on the card for body rhythm.
- **Subheading** (“Requester & organization”): **`text-base font-semibold leading-snug tracking-tight`** (compact heading line-height).
- **Metadata labels** (“Submitted by”, etc.): **`text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground`** (same overline pattern as the guideline heroes).
- **Primary values** (name, org name, table values): **`font-bold`**; **labels** in the table: **`font-normal text-muted-foreground`** — matches the “regular label / bold value” DO pattern.
- **Notice, empty state, org details, mail link**: **`text-base font-normal leading-[1.6]`** where appropriate; mail link explicitly **`font-normal`** so it doesn’t compete with values.
- **Table**: **`text-base leading-[1.6]`** on `<Table>` so row copy isn’t stuck at default `text-sm`; **`font-semibold`** on **`TableHead`**; value cells **`whitespace-normal`** so wrapping still works with the default table nowrap.

`oxlint` is clean on this file after switching **`tracking-[0.1em]`** to **`tracking-widest`** per the linter hint.
